name: Final Fantasy
description: Square's flagship RPG franchise, known for reinvention, dramatic storytelling, summons, crystals, and iconic music.

eras.title: Famicom Era
eras.description: Original 8-bit RPG trilogy establishing crystals, parties, jobs, and the series identity.

eras.title: Super Famicom Golden Era
eras.description: Narrative and systems peak of the 2D era.

eras.title: PlayStation Cinematic Era
eras.description: Pre-rendered backgrounds, cinematic presentation, and global mainstream breakthrough.

eras.title: PS2 and Online Expansion Era
eras.description: Voice acting, online RPG expansion, and more experimental structure.

eras.title: Modern Reinvention Era
eras.description: HD-era reinventions, MMO revival, action combat, and large-scale remakes.
